_schema: World Unlock grid tiles. Cost is computed when in World Unlock mode: tier points (config) × type multiplier (config). taskLink links tasks in tasks.json to this unlock. When tile is unlocked, linked tasks are added to the Global Task panel. taskLink types: (1) area = tasks where task.area/areas contains this tile's id (tile id must match area id). (2) skill = tasks where taskType matches skillName and difficulty matches tier; skill: tiles use 10 level bands (1-10,11-20,...,91-99); tile tier by band: 1-10,11-20,21-30,31-40â†’tier1; 41-50,51-60â†’tier2; 61-70,71-80â†’tier3; 81-90â†’tier4; 91-99â†’tier5. Task matching: taskType=skillName and difficulty=tier from level (1-39â†’tier1, 40-59â†’tier2, 60-79â†’tier3, 80-89â†’tier4, 90-99â†’tier5). Only tasks whose area (if any) is in the currently unlocked area set. (3) quest = tiles from Quests_and_Miniquests; taskLink taskFilter taskType Quest, requirementsContains quest name; tier from difficulty: Novice=1, Intermediate=2, Experienced=3, Master=4, Grandmaster=5, Special=3 (Recipe for Disaster and subquests). (4) taskFilter = tasks matching taskType and/or requirementsContains. (5) taskDisplayNames = explicit array of task displayName from tasks.json. (6) boss = tiles from boss_tiles.json; taskLink taskFilter taskType Boss, requirementsContains boss displayName; tier from boss level (1-200->1, 201-400->2, 401-600->3, 601-800->4, 801+->5); cost by tier 25/50/75/100/125. (7) achievement_diary tier = one tile per diary per tier (Easy/Medium/Hard/Elite); taskLink taskFilter taskType Achievement Diary, requirementsContains diary name/substring, optional difficulty = 1..4; tier 1-4 and cost 25/50/75/100.
